creator: rannumgen@globaleyes.net
text:
Tried compiling PDCurses-3.2/3.3/3.4 under Solaris10-x86 - too many
redefinition/syntax errors.

Tried compiling THE-3.2 with (recently released) PDCurses-3.4 under
FreeBSD-6.4. Compile and install goes just fine, but the non-working
cursor problem remains. Reinstalling PDCurses-3.2 restores a fully
functional cursor.

I don't know "who" has "the problem": THE or PDCurses. Nor do I know of
 a simple way to test, other than trying different versions of PDCurses.
In all cases, the version of THE is the same: 3.2.
